title: elymus glaucus var. marginatus
intro: Elymus glaucus var. marginatus, also known as blue wildrye or rough blue wildrye, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Elymus glaucus var. marginatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
